action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate 0.312 (new best), strong on DoorKey(0.86)/FourRooms(0.36)/KeyCorridor(0.9)/UnlockPickup(1.0) but 0.0 on 6 harder envs (LockedRoom/Lava/MultiRoom/Dynamic/DistShift) after 50M steps. Training stable (low value_loss, high explained_var). Analysis: FlatObs+MlpPolicy+multi-task PPO transfers well to related key/door tasks but insufficient steps/exploration/spatial bias for lava avoidance, dynamic objs, long-horizon multiroom; ~5M steps/env too low for hardest; 2h/50M allows ~100M run; only final metric logged (no curves). Decision: Update train.py for 100M total timesteps in 5M chunks w/ periodic eval+metrics.jsonl logging (20 points for curves), larger net_arch=[1024,512,256], gamma=0.995 (longer horizons), ent_coef=0.01, lr=2.5e-4, n_steps=1024/batch=4096; keep all else (16 DummyVec, FlatObs, Mlp, post-eval n=5). Submit eval for expected gains on medium tasks.
